hero.tagline: The only ones in Uruguay with official CATL certification.

overview.body: At NES, we are the only official representative and authorized technical service for CATL in Uruguay. CATL is the world's largest lithium battery manufacturer — and we are the bridge between that world-class technology and the local market. We operate with CATL-certified procedures, tools, and parts. No other company in Uruguay can offer this level of authorized technical service.

services.heading: Our Services
services.s1: Advanced Diagnostics — Voltage, impedance, cell balancing, and State of Health (SoH) analysis per module.
services.s2: BMS/Firmware Updates — Software management and system control updates.
services.s3: Preventive Maintenance — Scheduled plans to extend battery life and safety.
services.s4: Corrective Maintenance & Repair — With CATL-homologated parts and procedures.
services.s5: Thermal Control — Temperature management and overload protection.
services.s6: Warranty Management — Local support with full warranty traceability.
services.s7: Traceability & Reporting — Serial-level tracking, detailed technical reports for fleet operators and OEMs.

milestone.heading: A Historic Milestone
milestone.body: In January 2026, NES performed the first complete battery replacement on Montevideo's electric buses — a historic milestone for Uruguayan public transit and a demonstration of our unique capabilities.

catl.cta: Want to implement CATL service at your company?

hero.tagline: From 7 kW to 360 kW. Tailored solutions for every need.

overview.body: At NES, we design, install, and operate charging networks for commercial fleets, public spaces, and industrial projects. Every installation is a complete system — from electrical engineering to after-sales support. We don't just sell a charger: we deliver a scalable end-to-end solution.

specs.powerRange: Power range: 7 kW (AC slow) to 360 kW (DC fast charging)
specs.protocol: OCPP 2.0 protocol — compatible with any management platform
specs.features: Dynamic load balancing, simultaneous multi-vehicle charging, remote monitoring, user and consumption management

charging.usecases: Corporate fleets · Logistics hubs · Bus terminals · Public parking · Office buildings

hero.tagline: We're not a dealership. We're your electrification partner.

overview.body: NES commercializes high-performance electric trucks, buses, and machinery for companies transitioning to a zero-emissions fleet. Every vehicle comes integrated with CATL batteries and connected to our IoT platform — meaning you're not just buying a truck, but a complete management system. Over 50 units in operation in Uruguay are proof.

types.v1: Heavy-duty electric trucks (up to 900 km range on certain models)

diffs.d2: Significant fuel cost savings vs. traditional diesel.

hero.tagline: Store clean energy. Optimize costs. Guarantee continuity.

overview.body: NES's BESS systems allow companies and industries to store energy, integrate renewable sources, reduce peak demand charges, and ensure operational continuity — all backed by CATL battery technology and world-class components.

usecases.heading: Use Cases
usecases.u2: Peak demand charge reduction in electricity contracts
usecases.u3: Grid stability and backup power for industrial facilities

bess.sdg: Each BESS project contributes to SDGs 7 (Clean Energy), 9 (Industry & Innovation), and 13 (Climate Action).
bess.cta: Want to optimize your energy consumption?

overview.body: Through our DHEMAX and TrackTec platforms, NES connects vehicles, chargers, and batteries in real time. The result: a smarter, more efficient, and more predictable operation. Without telemetry, vehicles and chargers are just assets. With it, they become an intelligent operation.

capabilities.heading: Capabilities
capabilities.c1: Real-time monitoring: energy consumption, battery health, vehicle location and status.
capabilities.c2: Route optimization: analysis to improve efficiency and reduce operating costs.
capabilities.c3: Predictive maintenance: anticipate failures before they affect operations.
capabilities.c4: Centralized control: a single dashboard for the entire fleet and energy infrastructure.

iot.platforms: Platforms: DHEMAX and TrackTec — built for comprehensive fleet and energy management.

story.label: OUR STORY
story.h2: A Uruguayan company with global vision.
story.body: NES was born with the conviction that the energy transition was not a distant possibility — it was an urgent necessity. From the beginning, we committed to integrating world-class global technology with the expertise and closeness that only a local team can offer. Today, we are Uruguay's most complete electric mobility ecosystem, with over 10 years of executed projects, alliances with world-leading manufacturers, and a footprint that grows year after year.

mission.label: MISSION & VISION
mission.h2: Driving change toward a sustainable future.
mission.body: We believe that innovation, when applied with purpose, can accelerate the transition to a cleaner, smarter energy future. Sustainability is not just a goal — it is the foundation of every project we execute.

v1.title: Innovation with purpose
v1.body: We apply the most advanced technology to solve real challenges.

v2.title: Local commitment
v2.body: We are Uruguayan. We know the local market, regulations, and needs.

v3.title: World-class technology
v3.body: We work with the world's best manufacturers. Without compromising quality.

v4.title: Real, measurable impact
v4.body: We measure the impact of every project — in avoided emissions, gained efficiency, and improved operations.

partners.body: We work with the world's most recognized manufacturers in electric mobility and energy storage: CATL, KinWin, Guangtong, InfyPower, GTK, and SL New Energy.

hero.tagline: It's not a goal. It's the foundation of everything we do.

intro.body: Every project NES executes directly contributes to the decarbonization of transport and industry in Uruguay. We measure our impact — in tons of CO₂ avoided, in kilometers traveled without fuel, in renewable energy stored — because we believe that sustainability without evidence is just marketing.

sdg.7: SDG 7 — Affordable and Clean Energy: charging infrastructure and renewable integration.
sdg.9: SDG 9 — Industry, Innovation & Infrastructure: IoT platforms and advanced BESS systems.
sdg.11: SDG 11 — Sustainable Cities & Communities: electric buses for Montevideo's public transport.
sdg.13: SDG 13 — Climate Action: measurable emissions reduction in fleets and urban transport.

commitment.body: Every electric truck in operation replaces thousands of liters of diesel per year. Every BESS system installed makes renewable energy a continuous reality. Every charging point deployed brings Uruguay closer to a carbon-free future. This is not vision — it's what we're already building.

sustainability.cta: Want your company to be part of the change?

hero.label: STORIES THAT MOVE ENERGY
hero.subhead: Real projects, concrete partnerships, and innovations transforming mobility in Uruguay.

omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.title: NES revolutionizes electric transport in Uruguay: the coach connecting Montevideo, Colonia, and Punta del Este nonstop
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.excerpt: Latin America's first long-range electric coach: over 520 km of range, a full charge in 90 minutes, and daily operation for Buquebus.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p1: NES — New Energy Solutions — just made history: it brought to Uruguay the first long-range electric coach connecting Montevideo with Colonia and Punta del Este nonstop — zero emissions, zero fuel. A state-of-the-art Guangtong now running on Uruguay's highways thanks to the technology ecosystem only NES can deliver locally.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p2: While much of the industry still treated electric transport as distant, NES was already working to bring e-mobility to Uruguay's intercity routes. With over 10 years of experience, it built the partnerships, technical know-how, and execution capacity to deliver what no one else in the country could. When Buquebus needed to transform its land operation, it chose NES.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p3: The Montevideo–Colonia–Punta del Este route covers hundreds of kilometers — one of the most demanding intercity corridors in Uruguay. This coach completes it end to end with more than 520 km of real-world range, verified and validated by NES for local operating conditions. It is the first time in Latin America that a corridor of this scale runs 100% electric, without interruptions.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p4: Every component was selected to a rigorous standard: the best in the world, available in Uruguay, with local technical support. Latest-generation CATL batteries — NES is the only official representative and authorized technical service for CATL in Uruguay. Plus: capacity for 47 passengers, 110 km/h top speed, Inverter air conditioning, ECAS pneumatic suspension, and a Danas permanent-magnet electric steerable rear axle.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p5: The coach fully charges in ninety minutes — ready to cover another 520+ km. In practice, while the vehicle is in operational pause — cleaning, technical checks, driver rest — it is already charged for the next shift. This was possible because NES did not only supply the vehicle: it designed and integrated the charging infrastructure the operation requires.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p6: Behind this milestone lies more than a decade of work and partnerships with the world's leading manufacturers. NES is today Uruguay's most complete electric mobility company — the only one that can integrate vehicles, charging infrastructure, energy storage, and IoT telemetry in a unified system with first-class local support.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p7: Official CATL representative and authorized technical service. Over 3 MW of installed power. More than 50 electric trucks in operation. More than 40 connected vehicles with telemetry. And now, Latin America's first long-range electric coach operating in Uruguay.
omnibus-electrico-buquebus-uruguay.p8: If you want your company to write the next chapter of this story, NES is ready to support you — from strategy through operations, with global technology and the local backing only NES can guarantee in Uruguay.

recambio-baterias-buses-montevideo.title: First complete battery replacement on Montevideo's electric buses
recambio-baterias-buses-montevideo.excerpt: A historic milestone for Uruguayan public transit performed by NES's authorized CATL technical team.
recambio-baterias-buses-montevideo.p1: In January 2026, NES completed the first full battery replacement on Montevideo's electric bus fleet. The work was performed with procedures, tools, and parts homologated by CATL — the world's largest battery manufacturer.
recambio-baterias-buses-montevideo.p2: This project demonstrates NES's local capacity to operate world-class technology with technical support in Uruguay, ensuring public transport continuity and extending the city's asset lifecycle.
recambio-baterias-buses-montevideo.p3: The milestone consolidates NES as a regional reference in battery technical service and high-impact electric mobility.

alianza-estrategica-catl.title: NES as official CATL representative and technical service in Uruguay
alianza-estrategica-catl.excerpt: The partnership connecting world-leading battery technology with specialized local support.
alianza-estrategica-catl.p1: NES is the only official representative and authorized technical service for CATL in Uruguay. This strategic alliance enables companies, fleets, and transit operators to access diagnostics, maintenance, and repair to global standards.
alianza-estrategica-catl.p2: For local industry, it means less downtime, full warranty traceability, and direct access to the best energy storage technology available.

flota-camiones-electricos-uruguay.title: Over 50 electric trucks in operation in Uruguay
flota-camiones-electricos-uruguay.excerpt: NES drives commercial fleet electrification with vehicles integrated with telemetry and CATL batteries.
flota-camiones-electricos-uruguay.p1: With over 50 units in operation, NES supports Uruguayan companies transitioning to zero-emissions fleets. Every vehicle is delivered integrated with CATL batteries and connected to telemetry platforms for real-time management.
flota-camiones-electricos-uruguay.p2: Results include lower operating costs, reduced maintenance, and direct contribution to corporate decarbonization goals.

sistema-bess-industrial.title: BESS systems: storage that transforms industrial operations
sistema-bess-industrial.excerpt: Renewable integration, peak demand reduction, and operational continuity with CATL technology.
sistema-bess-industrial.p1: NES's BESS systems enable industries to store energy, integrate renewable sources, and reduce peak demand charges in electricity contracts.
sistema-bess-industrial.p2: Every installation is designed as a complete system — from engineering to operations — with world-class components and local technical support.

lanzamiento-app-nes-charge.title: NES Charge App: Uruguay's charging network in your pocket
lanzamiento-app-nes-charge.excerpt: Find, pay, and monitor charging sessions from iOS and Android.
lanzamiento-app-nes-charge.p1: The NES Charge App centralizes access to NES's charging network across Uruguay. Users can view real-time availability, pay for sessions, and receive notifications when charging completes.
lanzamiento-app-nes-charge.p2: The app is part of NES's integrated ecosystem: infrastructure, operations, and user experience in one place.

nes-movilidad-electrica-prensa.title: NES consolidates leadership in electric mobility in Uruguay
nes-movilidad-electrica-prensa.excerpt: Over a decade executing projects that transform national transport and industry.
nes-movilidad-electrica-prensa.p1: With over 10 years of experience, NES is positioned as the country's most complete electric mobility ecosystem: vehicles, charging, storage, IoT, and consumer applications.
nes-movilidad-electrica-prensa.p2: The company continues expanding its footprint with global partnerships and a Uruguayan technical team that supports every project from start to finish.
